root.sql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd') first_result, vendor_name.zh_name g1, meta_objects.object_name g2, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.ne_name g3, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vm_alarm_num g6, cast(round(tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vm_alarm_num/tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vnf_total_alarm_num*100,2) as varchar2(8)) g7, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vm_alarm_during g4, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.pr_alarm_num g8, cast(round(tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.pr_alarm_num/tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vnf_total_alarm_num*100,2) as varchar2(8)) g9, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vnf_total_alarm_num g10, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.pr_alarm_during g5 from tfa_alarm_vnf_sum tfa_alarm_vnf_sum ,vendor_name vendor_name,meta_objects meta_objects where tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# and tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vendor_id = vendor_name.type(+) and tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.ne_type = meta_objects.object_class(+) order by tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.first_result,tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.ne_name asc )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.countsql: select count(*) from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd') first_result, vendor_name.zh_name g1, meta_objects.object_name g2, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.ne_name g3, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vm_alarm_num g6, cast(round(tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vm_alarm_num/tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vnf_total_alarm_num*100,2) as varchar2(8)) g7, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vm_alarm_during g4, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.pr_alarm_num g8, cast(round(tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.pr_alarm_num/tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vnf_total_alarm_num*100,2) as varchar2(8)) g9, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vnf_total_alarm_num g10, tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.pr_alarm_during g5 from tfa_alarm_vnf_sum tfa_alarm_vnf_sum ,vendor_name vendor_name,meta_objects meta_objects where tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# and tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.vendor_id = vendor_name.type(+) and tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.ne_type = meta_objects.object_class(+) order by tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.first_result,tfa_alarm_vnf_sum.ne_name asc )

ColumnItem.DisplayName: 虚拟资源告警总历时(分钟)
物理资源告警总历时(分钟)
